programme.title: Albela
programme.desc: Tourist guide Tony (Govinda) is smitten by a light-eyed beauty Sonia (Aishwarya Rai) who arrives in Goa in search of her mother's grave. Convinced that she's his princess as a soothsayer predicted, Tony tries to woo her.

programme.title: Albela
programme.desc: Tourist guide Tony (Govinda) is smitten by a light-eyed beauty Sonia (Aishwarya Rai) who arrives in Goa in search of her mother's grave. Convinced that she's his princess as a soothsayer predicted, Tony tries to woo her.

programme.title: Albela
programme.desc: Tourist guide Tony (Govinda) is smitten by a light-eyed beauty Sonia (Aishwarya Rai) who arrives in Goa in search of her mother's grave. Convinced that she's his princess as a soothsayer predicted, Tony tries to woo her.

programme.title: Baatein Kahi Ankahi
programme.desc: Watch Baatein Kahi Ankahi with RJ Anmol In An Exclusive Interview With Bollywood Stars.

programme.title: 50 Lakh
programme.desc: When the Narcotics Control Bureau declare a cash prize for capturing crime kingpin Irfan Khan, the terrorist hatches a plan to hijack a plane to Kathmandu and recruits four unsuspecting young men to assist him in the plan.

programme.title: 50 Lakh
programme.desc: When the Narcotics Control Bureau declare a cash prize for capturing crime kingpin Irfan Khan, the terrorist hatches a plan to hijack a plane to Kathmandu and recruits four unsuspecting young men to assist him in the plan.

programme.desc: When the Narcotics Control Bureau declare a cash prize for capturing crime kingpin Irfan Khan, the terrorist hatches a plan to hijack a plane to Kathmandu and recruits four unsuspecting young men to assist him in the plan.

programme.desc: When the Narcotics Control Bureau declare a cash prize for capturing crime kingpin Irfan Khan, the terrorist hatches a plan to hijack a plane to Kathmandu and recruits four unsuspecting young men to assist him in the plan.

programme.title: 50 Lakh
programme.desc: When the Narcotics Control Bureau declare a cash prize for capturing crime kingpin Irfan Khan, the terrorist hatches a plan to hijack a plane to Kathmandu and recruits four unsuspecting young men to assist him in the plan.

programme.title: Amar Akbar Anthony
programme.desc: A family of five is separated in an unfortunate incident. The three brothers are raised in different religious households. As fate would have it, the family reunites after several years and avenges those responsible for their separation.

programme.title: Amar Akbar Anthony
programme.desc: A family of five is separated in an unfortunate incident. The three brothers are raised in different religious households. As fate would have it, the family reunites after several years and avenges those responsible for their separation.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal’s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Champion
programme.desc: A burly Inspector is on a quest to wipe off crime. After rigorous police training to eliminate hardened criminals, he is assigned to protect a nine-year-old orphan, who happens to be an heir to millions.

programme.title: Champion
programme.desc: A burly Inspector is on a quest to wipe off crime. After rigorous police training to eliminate hardened criminals, he is assigned to protect a nine-year-old orphan, who happens to be an heir to millions.
